channel.title: redhat-cnalr — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by redhat-cnalr (redhat-cnalr).

item.title: CVE-2026-15720 · 8.6 HIGH 🌩️ — Pre-auth heap out-of-bounds read in the AMF NAS 5GS mobile-identity handler
item.description: In Open5GS through version 2.7.7 a pre-authentication heap out-of-bounds read in the AMF NAS 5GS mobile-identity handler may result in subscriber-wide denial of service.

item.title: CVE-2026-40472 · 9.9 CRITICAL — Hackage package metadata stored XSS vulnerability
item.description: In hackage-server, user-controlled metadata from .cabal files are rendered into HTML href attributes without proper sanitization, enabling stored Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) attacks.

item.title: CVE-2026-40471 · 9.6 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Hackage CSRF vulnerability
item.description: hackage-server lacked Cross-Site Request Forgery (CSRF) protection across its endpoints. Scripts on foreign sites could trigger requests to hackage server, possibly abusing latent credentials to upload packages or perform other administrative actions…

item.title: CVE-2026-40470 · 9.9 CRITICAL — Hackage package and doc upload stored XSS vulnerability
item.description: A critical XSS vulnerability affected hackage-server and hackage.haskell.org. HTML and JavaScript files provided in source packages or via the documentation upload facility were served as-is on the main hackage.haskell.org domain. As a consequence, w…

item.title: CVE-2026-1616 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — osim: Path Traversal via query parameters in Nginx configuration
item.description: The $uri$args concatenation in nginx configuration file present in Open Security Issue Management (OSIM) prior v2025.9.0 allows path traversal attacks via query parameters.

item.title: CVE-2025-31162 · 6.6 MEDIUM — fig2dev float point exception
item.description: Floating point exception in fig2dev in version 3.2.9a allows an attacker to availability via local input manipulation via get_slope function.

item.title: CVE-2025-31163 · 6.6 MEDIUM — fig2dev segmentation fault
item.description: Segmentation fault in fig2dev in version 3.2.9a allows an attacker to availability via local input manipulation via put_patternarc function.

item.title: CVE-2025-31164 · 6.6 MEDIUM — fig2dev heap-buffer overflow
item.description: heap-buffer overflow in fig2dev in version 3.2.9a allows an attacker to availability via local input manipulation via create_line_with_spline.

item.title: CVE-2025-2312 · 5.9 MEDIUM — cifs.upcall makes an upcall to the wrong namespace in containerized environments
item.description: A flaw was found in cifs-utils. When trying to obtain Kerberos credentials, the cifs.upcall program from the cifs-utils package makes an upcall to the wrong namespace in containerized environments. This issue may lead to disclosing sensitive data fro…
